# Outflows — Bills Tracker

> Track bills, subscriptions, and recurring payments in one place. Never miss a due date or pay a late fee again.

Outflows is a simple, calm mobile app for tracking monthly bills, recurring charges, and upcoming due dates. It gives users a clean monthly overview so fixed expenses are always visible before they become surprises.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://pcristo.dev/outflows_website/): Overview and download
- [Privacy Policy](https://pcristo.dev/outflows_website/privacy.html)
- [Terms of Service](https://pcristo.dev/outflows_website/terms.html)

## Features

- **Monthly Outlook** — See your total planned spend and track what's on-track vs. overdue
- **Due Date Tracking** — View upcoming bills at a glance, week by week
- **Recurring & One-Off Bills** — Track rent, utilities, subscriptions, and any irregular payment in one flow
- **Late Fee Prevention** — Stay ahead of every payment before it becomes a problem

## Design Philosophy

Built for real life: fast to update, easy to scan, and clear enough to trust every day.

## Availability

- iOS (App Store)
- Android (Google Play)
- Free to download

Made by Paulo Cristo © 2026
